ocr_text:
Noted Heart Specialist Is Flown From Boston to Denver by U. S. Air Force Plane; 2D TERM POSSIBLE, TOP DOCTOR SAYS Dr. P. D. White Cites Cases of Good Recovery From Coronary Thrombosis TWO WEEKS MAY TELL Probable Recovery Expected by Physician if All Goes Well in That Time
White says another term in office for Pres is possible; discusses nature of coronary thrombosis; calls next 2 wks critical; cites cases of recovery; early rept that Pres walked to car on way to hosp corrected; had been supported on his feet; White arrival illus; security guard illus

KANSAS SOIL GOING WITH WIND AGAIN; Drought in 15-County Area Opens Way to Gale Erosion --Loss Less Than in 1954
wind storms damage crop, Kan; outlook
